---
title: "FRESH Insights"
subtitle: "Notes on nutrition measurement, dietary surveys, and what the headline numbers miss."
listing:
  contents:
    - "not-the-price-of-fruit/index.qmd"
    - "not-the-price-of-fruit-notes/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

A working notebook from the **FRESH** usual-intake pipeline — reproducing the
canonical dietary-adherence numbers, then pushing past them to the subgroup
resolution and estimand choices the single headline figure quietly hides.
